lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: Thanks for helping me. Is there anything you'd like to know about this temple? If you find anything in here, show it to me and I'll tell you what I know about it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: This place probably had a name at some point but it has long since been forgotten. The Arceuus librarians refer to this place as the Forthos Dungeon.

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: It is rumoured that this place used to be of religious significance to druidic followers of both Ralos and Ranul.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are Ralos and Ranul?

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: According to religious texts, Ralos is the god of the sun and Ranul, his brother, is the god of the moon.

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: If you find any artifacts or relics from within this temple, I would be very interested in seeing them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll see what I find. Although, I've never heard of Ralos and Ranul.

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: You need only to look up and see their greatness above you when you return to the surface.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: My name is Brother Aimeri, I am a travelling monk from the distant land of Varlamore on a journey to uncover the secrets of this temple.

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: I worship Ralos, a common practice where I am from. However, I found out that our order may have originated from this temple. If you find anything of interest, please let me know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll keep my eyes open.

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: You have my gratitude. Any information you do find would also be of interest to the Arceuus Library. I hope we can uncover the secrets of this place for the greater good.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The greater good.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you get injured?

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: I found out about this place from Logosia in the Arceuus Library. I came to investigate but was ambushed by the spiders in the room to the north.

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: I'm a scholar not a fighter. I didn't have time to think through my options so I did what came naturally and ran away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why didn't you decide to run back the way you came from instead of running further into the dungeon where there could be more dangerous creatures?

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: See, the problem with that... Is that it is an excellent idea I wish I had thought of at the time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You've been trapped here for a while! No wonder you were hungry!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: Nilsal, traveller. I was injured while exploring down here. Could you spare me some cooked fish, meat or vegetables?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It just so happens that I have some with me!

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: Oh, please hand it over if you can spare it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid that I don't have any of that type of food with me.

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: Oh, well if you return with any I would greatly appreciate it.

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: No thanks. I would rather eat fish, meat or vegetables.

sections.title: Adding pages to the Tome of the Sun
Adding pages to the Tome of the Moon
Adding pages to the Tome of the Temple

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: Oh, very interesting. This page appears to be taken from a religious script which speaks of Ralos.

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: This is very sad. To see such religious scripts desecrated, it's blasphemy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Perhaps the script still exists?

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: Yes, yes! I hope so. I would expect a temple of this nature to have a library of sorts within it. Maybe the original is somewhere within it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll have a look for it. Thanks for your help!

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: Oh, very interesting. This page appears to be taken from a religious script which speaks of Ranul.

lines.speaker: Player

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: Oh, very interesting. This page appears to be taken from a historical script about the temple itself.

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: This is very sad. To see such information desecrated in this way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Perhaps the script still exists?

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: Yes, yes! I hope so. I would expect a temple of this nature to have a library of sorts within it. Maybe the original is somewhere within it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll have a look for it. Thanks for your help!

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: Amazing! This is exactly what I was looking for. This tome contains information about the religion of Ralos.

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: Oh, it appears that there are some pages missing from it. The missing information could prove valuable.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do you think the missing pages are?

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: This Temple has been abandoned for some time. Maybe the creatures within have destroyed the tome while looking for food. You may have to kill them to recover the pages.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help!

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: Amazing! This is exactly what I was looking for. This tome contains information about the religion of Ralos.

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: The book seems to be intact! I'm sure Logosia in the Arceuus Library to the north would find this information valuable.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help!

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: Amazing! This is exactly what I was looking for. This tome contains information about the religion of Ranul.

lines.speaker: Player

lines.text: Amazing! This is exactly what I was looking for. This tome contains information about the temple itself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help!

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: Amazing! This is exactly what I was looking for. This tome contains information about the temple itself.

lines.speaker: Brother Aimeri
lines.text: The book seems to be intact! I'm sure Logosia in the Arceuus Library to the north would find this information valuable.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help!

lines.speaker: Logosia
lines.text: I have not seen this before. Your donation to the library is appreciated.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You can have this tome which I discovered aswell.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You can have these tomes which I discovered aswell.

lines.speaker: Logosia
lines.text: Your contributions to the library have been noticed. We would like to reward you for your assistance.

lines.speaker: Logosia
lines.text: If you find any spare pages for these books I would be willing to give you 1,000 gold for each one. Duplicate sources of information are always useful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll keep an eye out.

lines.speaker: Logosia
lines.text: Enough talk now, Shhhh!
